test-case.name: Embedded provisioning at first boot.lifecycle.reports completed via KVP
test-case.fullname: Embedded provisioning at first boot.lifecycle.reports completed via KVP

test-case.name: Embedded provisioning at first boot.lifecycle.reports a non-empty instance id via KVP
test-case.fullname: Embedded provisioning at first boot.lifecycle.reports a non-empty instance id via KVP
test-case.methodname: reports a non-empty instance id via KVP

test-case.name: Embedded provisioning at first boot.lifecycle.wrote the state file inside the guest
test-case.fullname: Embedded provisioning at first boot.lifecycle.wrote the state file inside the guest
test-case.methodname: wrote the state file inside the guest

test-case.name: Embedded provisioning at first boot.lifecycle.is running the patched binary (egs-service commit SHA matches host build)
test-case.fullname: Embedded provisioning at first boot.lifecycle.is running the patched binary (egs-service commit SHA matches host build)
test-case.methodname: is running the patched binary (egs-service commit SHA matches host build)

test-case.name: Embedded provisioning at first boot.lifecycle.did not run cloudbase-init
test-case.fullname: Embedded provisioning at first boot.lifecycle.did not run cloudbase-init

test-suite.name: cloud-config payload was applied
test-suite.fullname: Embedded provisioning at first boot.cloud-config payload was applied
test-suite.classname: Embedded provisioning at first boot.cloud-config payload was applied

test-case.name: Embedded provisioning at first boot.cloud-config payload was applied.SetHostnameModule set the computer name to egs-prov-e2e
test-case.fullname: Embedded provisioning at first boot.cloud-config payload was applied.SetHostnameModule set the computer name to egs-prov-e2e
test-case.methodname: SetHostnameModule set the computer name to egs-prov-e2e
test-case.classname: Embedded provisioning at first boot.cloud-config payload was applied

test-case.name: Embedded provisioning at first boot.cloud-config payload was applied.UsersGroupsModule created prov_test_user in Administrators
test-case.fullname: Embedded provisioning at first boot.cloud-config payload was applied.UsersGroupsModule created prov_test_user in Administrators
test-case.classname: Embedded provisioning at first boot.cloud-config payload was applied

test-case.name: Embedded provisioning at first boot.cloud-config payload was applied.WriteFilesModule produced the plain marker file
test-case.fullname: Embedded provisioning at first boot.cloud-config payload was applied.WriteFilesModule produced the plain marker file
test-case.methodname: WriteFilesModule produced the plain marker file
test-case.classname: Embedded provisioning at first boot.cloud-config payload was applied

test-case.name: Embedded provisioning at first boot.cloud-config payload was applied.WriteFilesModule decoded the base64 marker file
test-case.fullname: Embedded provisioning at first boot.cloud-config payload was applied.WriteFilesModule decoded the base64 marker file
test-case.methodname: WriteFilesModule decoded the base64 marker file
test-case.classname: Embedded provisioning at first boot.cloud-config payload was applied

test-case.name: Embedded provisioning at first boot.cloud-config payload was applied.RuncmdModule executed the runcmd entry
test-case.fullname: Embedded provisioning at first boot.cloud-config payload was applied.RuncmdModule executed the runcmd entry
test-case.classname: Embedded provisioning at first boot.cloud-config payload was applied

test-suite.name: CLI on the guest
test-suite.fullname: Embedded provisioning at first boot.CLI on the guest
test-suite.classname: Embedded provisioning at first boot.CLI on the guest

test-case.name: Embedded provisioning at first boot.CLI on the guest.egs-service status --json reports Final completed
test-case.fullname: Embedded provisioning at first boot.CLI on the guest.egs-service status --json reports Final completed
test-case.classname: Embedded provisioning at first boot.CLI on the guest
